value.found_quote: **`CLAUDE.md`**: shared project instructions that Claude Code uses for all tasks, not just reviews. Code Review reads it as project context and flags newly introduced violations as nits.
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes CLAUDE.md as shared project instructions that Claude Code uses, read by Code Review as project context — matching the claim. Code Review itself is in research preview, but the CLAUDE.md feature is described as actively used.
